title: A fuel injector
abstract: The present invention proposes a fuel injector (1) including an actuator foot (2) and an actuator sleeve (3) coaxially surrounding a threaded portion (21) of said actuator foot (2); wherein the actuator sleeve (3) comprises threads (31) to cooperate the threaded portion (21) of the actuator foot (2) so that the actuator foot (2) and the actuator sleeve (3) are coaxially assembled through cooperation of the threaded portion (21) of the actuator foot (2) and the threads (31) of the actuator sleeve (3).
claims: Claims CLAIMS: 1. A fuel injector (1 ) including an actuator foot (2) and an actuator sleeve (3) coaxially surrounding a threaded portion (21 ) of said actuator foot (2); wherein the actuator sleeve (3) comprises threads (31 ) to cooperate the threaded portion (21 ) of the actuator foot (2) so that the actuator foot (2) and the actuator sleeve (3) are coaxially assembled through cooperation of the threaded portion (21 ) of the actuator foot (2) and the threads (31 ) of the actuator sleeve (3). 2. The fuel injector according to the claim 1 , wherein the threaded portion (21 ) of the actuator foot (2) and corresponding threads (31 ) of the actuator sleeve (3) are formed from materials having toughness values different from each other. 3. The fuel injector according to any of the claims 1 or 2, further comprising a ring (4) positioned around the threaded portion (21 ) of the actuator foot (2); the ring (4) being formed from a material which having a lower toughness than those forming the threaded portion (21 ) of the actuator foot (2) and forming the threads (31 ) of the actuator sleeve (3). 4. The fuel injector according to any of the claims 1 to 3, wherein the material forming the ring (4) comprises PTFE. 5. The fuel injector according to any of the claims 1 to 4, wherein the ring (4) has an inner diameter which is essentially equal to or smaller than an outer diameter of the threaded portion (21 ) of the actuator foot (2). 6. The fuel injector according to any of the claims 1 to 5, threaded portion (21 ) of the actuator foot (2) and/or the threads (31 ) of the actuator sleeve (3) is coated with PTFE.
